## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Overall coverage 72.3% below the default 80% bar**

  - **Likely cause:** No enforced threshold; feature-velocity growth.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add unit tests for `internal/xdg` path resolution and error branches in `internal/skills`/`internal/sync`.
